title: Stonecutter Recycling ♻️
description: Uncraft items in the stonecutter to recover the resources used to craft them. 1200 Recipes!
body:
**♻️ Stonecutter Recycling**

Stonecutter Recycling adds a simple but powerful feature to the game:
It allows you to uncraft almost every item in the game using the stonecutter.

Instead of throwing away items you no longer need, you can recycle them back into their original crafting materials.

Just place an item into the stonecutter, select the recycling recipe, and receive the resources that were used to craft the item.

This makes resource management much easier and helps reduce wasted materials during gameplay.

This mod adds 1200! new uncrafting recipes

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🪨 How it works**

Place a stonecutter.

Put an item inside the stonecutter.

Select the item you want.

Get the original crafting materials back.

It’s that simple!

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**✨ Features**

♻️ Uncraft almost every craftable item

🧱 Recover valuable resources

⚒️ Uses the vanilla stonecutter interface

📦 Great for fixing crafting mistakes

🔧 Lightweight and simple

![sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62c8f3c867d99fb881f194f136518adb534d35b4.png)

![beacon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c1ce4914318b2b0a4e8d95efabab655e022eb1d.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**⚠️ Important Warning**

This mod can ensure that you get back more than you put into the stone cutter
![stairs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d8ad7e7408eb181273ab4f9f254b8befe989b85.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
